description: Complete the remaining server-side phases of ADR-065: hex init registers projects, deprecate legacy /api/agents/connect endpoint, and make agent_connect reducer accept client-provided agent_id for identity persistence across nexus restarts.

phases.name: Reducer accepts client-provided agent_id
phases.description: Update the agent_connect reducer in hexflo-coordination WASM module to accept an optional agent_id field. If provided and not already taken, reuse it instead of generating a new UUID. This prevents identity drift when agents reconnect after nexus restarts. Also update the /api/hex-agents/connect REST handler in hex-nexus to forward the agent_id field to the reducer.

tasks.name: Update agent_connect reducer to accept optional agent_id
tasks.description: In spacetime-modules/hexflo-coordination/src/lib.rs, modify the agent_connect reducer to accept an optional agent_id: Option<String> parameter. If Some and no existing agent has that ID, use it as the primary key. If None or collision, generate a new UUID as before. Return the actual ID used in the response.

tasks.name: Forward agent_id in REST handler
tasks.description: In hex-nexus/src/adapters/spacetime_state.rs (or wherever POST /api/hex-agents/connect is handled), extract the optional agent_id field from the request body and pass it to the reducer call. No behavior change if field is absent.

phases.name: Auto-register project on agent connect
phases.description: When agent_connect receives a project_dir, derive project_name from basename, call project_find reducer. If not found, call register_project to create it. Set agent.project_id to the resolved project ID. This ensures projects exist in SpacetimeDB when agents connect from new repos.

tasks.name: Add project auto-registration to agent_connect reducer
tasks.description: In the agent_connect reducer, after creating/finding the agent: if project_dir is non-empty, derive project_name = basename(project_dir). Call project_find(project_name). If not found, call register_project(generated_id, project_name, project_dir). Set agent.project_id = resolved project_id.

phases.name: hex init registers project in SpacetimeDB
phases.description: When hex init scaffolds a project, it should also register the project in SpacetimeDB so it appears in the dashboard immediately. Call the register_project reducer (or POST /api/projects) with the project name and directory.

tasks.name: Add project registration to hex init
tasks.description: After hex init completes scaffolding, POST to /api/projects with { name: basename(path), path: abs_path }. If nexus is not running, skip silently (project will be registered on next agent connect). Log a message: 'Project registered in SpacetimeDB' or 'Nexus offline — project will register on first agent connect'.

phases.name: Deprecate legacy /api/agents/connect
phases.description: Add a redirect from POST /api/agents/connect to POST /api/hex-agents/connect with a Deprecation header. Log a warning on the server side. Remove the old handler after one release cycle.

tasks.name: Add redirect + deprecation header
tasks.description: In hex-nexus router, replace the POST /api/agents/connect handler with a 308 Permanent Redirect to /api/hex-agents/connect. Add header Deprecation: true and Sunset: 2026-04-30. Log a warning with the caller's IP/agent. Keep GET /api/agents/* routes for backward compat during transition.

phases.name: Integration test
phases.description: End-to-end validation: (1) hex agent connect sends agent_id, server reuses it — verify same ID on reconnect. (2) hex agent connect from new project dir — verify project auto-registered. (3) hex init — verify project in SpacetimeDB. (4) POST /api/agents/connect — verify 308 redirect.

tasks.name: Integration tests for all 4 server-side changes
tasks.description: Add tests to hex-nexus/tests/ verifying: (1) agent_connect with agent_id reuses the ID; (2) agent_connect with project_dir auto-registers project; (3) POST /api/agents/connect returns 308; (4) hex init registers project when nexus is running.
